cluster_samples.cluster_title: Demonstration of autonomous testing on a local 121B model
core_facts: NVIDIA AI shares a demo of running a 121B model locally with autonomous testing via Hermes agent.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Anthropic surpasses OpenAI in enterprise AI subscription share
core_facts: Anthropic surpassed OpenAI in enterprise AI subscription share in April, with 34.4% vs 32.3% per Ramp AI Index.
Notion announces CLI for developers and coding agents to interact with Notion programmatically.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Critique of METR time horizon graph methodology
core_facts: Gary Marcus critiques METR's time horizon graph, suggesting improvements like including lines for accuracy criteria and clarifying tasks are software engineering.
A Harvard Business Review survey of 1,500 workers reveals that excessive AI interaction causes mental exhaustion, especially among high performers.
GPT Image 2 is now integrated into Lovable.

cluster_samples.cluster_title: Claude Code 发布 Agent View
core_facts: Claude Code 发布了多任务统一窗口管理工具 Agent View，可将多个会话集中到一个界面管理，实时查看状态并切换。

prompt_iteration_notes.notes: Primary relation enums remain stable; prompt versions bumped to v3 with stricter same-event rules.

reasons: Use dry-run reports for manual review before write-real-db.
Candidate recall is still lexical/entity/time/source hybrid, not vector-indexed.
5 LLM failures observed in this run.

recommendations: Add vector indexes for item_cards and cluster_cards before larger runs.
Keep primary relation enum unchanged for now; it covered Phase 1.1 control flow.
Collect more source_signals before trusting source_profile priority suggestions.
Run a larger dry-run before any write-real-db semantic pass.
